column1: MILESTONE 2 — Core Repository Build
ToR Deliverables: (1) First Functional MVP on Staging  (2) User Testing Report #1 (usability findings and design revisions)  |  Budget: ₦2,000,000 | Weeks 5–8 | 6 Jul – 1 Aug 2026
WEEK 5 — Backend Foundation & Auth System

column4: Backend: Set up PostgreSQL 15 + PostGIS database schema — users, roles, datasets, uploads, downloads, audit_log, campaigns, facilities tables
Backend: Implement user authentication — JWT token issuance, RBAC middleware (5 roles: Public / Registered / Contributor / Admin / Super Admin), password hashing (Argon2id), 2FA via Termii SMS OTP
Frontend: Build Login page (3-tier access level selector) and Register page with access level dropdown
DevOps: Docker containerisation of all services; GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline configured for auto-deploy to staging on push to main branch

column1: WEEK 6 — Dataset Upload, Data Portal UI & Approval Workflow

column4: Backend: Build dataset upload API — file validation, S3-compatible object storage, ClamAV virus scan before storage, metadata form ingestion
Frontend: Build Data Portal page — 4 category filter pills, search bar, dataset card grid (3 columns), dataset detail info modal with full metadata
Backend: Build 3-step dataset approval workflow — Initial Review queue, Quality Assessment stage, Approval & Publication to live portal
Frontend + Backend: Admin Console — Review Queue (pending submissions), User Management (create/disable/role changes), Audit Logs (searchable, exportable)

column1: WEEK 7 — Supporting Pages, Notifications & Email System

column4: Backend: Implement immutable audit logging — record all CRUD events (upload, download, edit, approve, reject, login, logout) with actor ID, timestamp, and IP address
column5: Audit log live, exportable as CSV

column4: Frontend: Build Submit Data page (two-column layout — form + requirements + 3-step review process)
Frontend: Build About page (mission/vision, partners, what we do)
Backend: Email notification system — submission confirmed (to contributor), dataset approved, dataset rejected with reason, account activated (to new Partner/Admin)
Send Fortnightly Sprint Report #2 to FACT Foundation

column4: Full MVP integration testing on staging: run end-to-end test of all flows (register → upload → approve → download → audit log)
Conduct Usability Testing Session #1 with government stakeholders (health planners, M&E officers, data managers) — structured walkthrough of staging MVP
column8: First on-site visit — travel covered by FACT

column4: Write and deliver User Testing Report #1: usability findings by feature area, design revisions implemented, outstanding issues list, participant feedback summary
Submit all Milestone 2 deliverables to FACT Foundation for formal sign-off

column4: Apply all design and UX revisions identified in User Testing Report #1 to staging MVP
Build Analytics Dashboard — disease metric selector dropdown (malaria, meningitis, cholera, diphtheria, immunisation, U5 mortality), Export button

column4: PostGIS: Load Niger State LGA boundary shapefiles (25 LGAs with names, codes, area) into database
PostGIS: Load Niger State Ward boundary shapefiles (~274 wards) into database
Build GIS Disease Burden Map page — full-screen Leaflet.js map, proportional red bubble markers by case count, zoom controls, Niger State population badge
GIS Disease Burden Map — filter panel (metric selector, value type, case range inputs, year + month dropdowns, LGA dropdown, ward dropdown)
GIS Disease Burden Map — yearly trend mini-chart (bottom-left, 2013–present, click-to-monthly) + Burden Summary panel (top/bottom 5 LGAs)
Build GIS Health Facility Map page — blue dot markers per facility, facility name hover label, popup (Name, LGA, Ward, Facility Code, Type), filter panel (search, LGA/ward/type dropdowns)
Send Fortnightly Sprint Report #3 to FACT Foundation

column1: WEEK 11 — Campaigns, AI Assistant & API Documentation

column4: Build Campaigns module — campaign listing page with hero banner, campaign cards (name, status badge, start date, coverage %, vaccinated count, target, active days, LGA count, progress bar), admin CRUD for campaign records

Build AI Assistant floating widget — green chat bubble (all pages), chat panel, Niger State-tailored greeting, 5 quick question shortcuts, text input + send; backend RAG pipeline over portal data via LLM API
Publish REST API documentation via Swagger/OpenAPI 3.0 at /api/docs — covers all endpoints: auth, datasets, search, upload, spatial queries, analytics

column4: DHIS2 interoperability assessment: evaluate DHIS2 API availability for Niger State, document integration options, design sync connector architecture if applicable
column8: Connector built only if API is accessible

column4: Build admin bulk import tool — batch upload multiple datasets simultaneously with metadata applied via XLSX template, avoiding manual entry per dataset
Build access request system for restricted datasets — request form, admin approval/rejection flow, email notification to requester

Build Tools & Learning page — hero carousel (2 slides), tutorial search bar, 5 tabs (Video Tutorials, E-Books & Guides, Core Tools, Sample Data & Tutorials, Learning Path), QGIS featured playlist, 4 resource cards
Security audit: HTTPS enforcement, CORS configuration, SQL injection testing, XSS testing, RBAC penetration check, ClamAV verification, AES-256 at-rest encryption check
